scripts.consumer:fat-lib:serve-and-e2e: start-server-and-test 'pnpm exec http-server src/app-fat-lib/ -p 8080 -s' http://localhost:8080 'cd ../consumer-e2e && ../../node_modules/.bin/cypress run --e2e --config baseUrl=http://localhost:8080 --spec src/e2e/consumer-fat-lib.cy.ts'
scripts.consumer:named:serve-and-e2e: start-server-and-test 'pnpm exec http-server ../../build/dist/apps/consumer-named -p 4212 -s' http://localhost:4212 'cd ../consumer-e2e && ../../node_modules/.bin/cypress run --e2e --config baseUrl=http://localhost:4212 --spec src/e2e/consumer-named.cy.ts'
scripts.consumer:side-effect:serve-and-e2e: start-server-and-test 'pnpm exec http-server ../../build/dist/apps/consumer-side-effect -p 4213 -s' http://localhost:4213 'cd ../consumer-e2e && ../../node_modules/.bin/cypress run --e2e --config baseUrl=http://localhost:4213 --spec src/e2e/consumer-side-effect.cy.ts'
